questions.statement:
The value of <span class="math-tex">\(\left[ {\frac{4}{7}\rm \;of\;2\frac{4}{5} \times 1\frac{2}{3} - \left( {3\frac{1}{2} - 2\frac{1}{6}} \right)} \right] \div \left( {3\frac{1}{5} \div 4\frac{1}{2}\;\rm of\;\;5\frac{1}{3}} \right)\)</span> is:
<span class="math-tex">\(\left[ {\frac{4}{7}\rm \;of\;2\frac{4}{5} \times 1\frac{2}{3} - \left( {3\frac{1}{2} - 2\frac{1}{6}} \right)} \right] \div \left( {3\frac{1}{5} \div 4\frac{1}{2}\;\rm of\;\;5\frac{1}{3}} \right)\)</span> का मान है:

The value of <span class="math-tex">\(\frac{7+3\sqrt5}{3+\sqrt5}-\frac{7-3\sqrt5}{3-\sqrt{5}}\)</span>lies between:
 <span class="math-tex">\(\frac{7+3\sqrt5}{3+\sqrt5}-\frac{7-3\sqrt5}{3-\sqrt{5}}\)</span>का मान_____ के बीच है।

The value of <span class="math-tex">\(\frac{{27 \times {{\left( {0.25} \right)}^3} + 125\;{{\left( {0.05} \right)}^3}}}{{{{(0.75)}^2} - 0.25 \times 0.5\;\;\;\;}}\)</span> is
<span class="math-tex">\(\frac{{27 × {{\left( {0.25} \right)}^3} + 125{{\left( {0.05} \right)}^3}}}{{{{\left( {0.75} \right)}^2} - 0.25 × 0.5}}\)</span> का मान क्या है?
